description: Produces a high-quality summary of the input content, adhering to provided instructions and examples if provided.

input_variables.name: lengthInSentences
input_variables.description: The desired number of sentences for the summary

input_variables.name: summaryInstructions
input_variables.description: Additional instructions on how to approach the summary
input_variables.default: Provide a high-level summary of the input content, focusing on the key points and main ideas. Focus on roles (ex: a client) rather than specific people (Mr Smith).

input_variables.name: examples
input_variables.description: Examples of summaries to guide the output style and tone
